query:
SELECT g.nome, c.codigo, c.tipo, c.destino, c.usado, c.expiraEm, c.createdAt
FROM codigosAcessoGestante c
JOIN gestantes g ON g.id = c.gestanteId
WHERE g.nome LIKE '%Thaiane%' OR g.nome LIKE '%Massarim%'
ORDER BY c.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 5;
